data.name: Bruce Wayne
data.player_statement:
A complete player, Bruce Wayne has made a big mark in cricket. With 31 turns at the crease, they've hit a top score of 38, with an average of 15.50 and a quick strike rate of 82.92. Their knack for hitting big shots is evident with 3 sixes and 44 fours.

Equally good at bowling, they've bowled 73.1 overs, taking 42 wickets at an economy rate of 4.67. Despite a few wides, their accuracy is top-notch, making them a key player for their team.
